race.comment: Open race to close out the card. SIR MAURICE (3) is a consistent conveyance who has hit the top-four at his past five outings and looks to be building up to another victory. Has a win and two seconds from five spins around this circuit and looks very well-placed against this line-up. Goes on top despite the sticky draw. BABALOLA (20) resumes here but is yet to miss a place in four first-up attempts and has had two trials in preparation for this. Can feature while fresh. BODHRAN (10) got the maiden out of the way before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Include from the inside alley. Former Victorian GOLDEN MIKKI (2) is having his first run for the new stable but should find this easier than what he faced down south. Respect any market moves. The well-related A TOUCH FROM FAYT (7) (half to G3 winner Wapiti) best of the rest.
